tests.description: mapSignalsToVisuals returns curveSoftness and structureComplexity fields
tests.context: Add inside the existing 'US-008: Define partially legible mapping rules' describe block. The defaultInputs fixture already exists and includes touchCapable, screenWidth, screenHeight, devicePixelRatio, hardwareConcurrency. Must also update the defaultParams VisualParams fixture (if used elsewhere) to include curveSoftness and structureComplexity.

tests.description: touchToSoftness returns 0.8 for touch-capable, 0.3 for non-touch, 0.5 for null
tests.context: Add inside the existing 'US-008' describe block. Tests the touchToSoftness helper indirectly through mapSignalsToVisuals.

tests.description: structureComplexity is in 0.2-1.0 range for various device profiles
tests.context: Add inside the existing 'US-008' describe block. Tests profileToComplexity helper indirectly. Covers low-end, mid-range, high-end, null values, and ultrawide screen.

tests.description: structureComplexity handles zero screen dimensions without NaN or Infinity
tests.context: Add inside the existing 'US-008' describe block. Guards against division by zero in the aspect ratio calculation when both screen dimensions are 0.

tests.description: curveSoftness and structureComplexity contain no raw browser strings
tests.context: Add inside the existing 'US-008' describe block. Verifies acceptance criterion: no raw browser strings shown.

tests.description: curveSoftness and structureComplexity are stable — same inputs yield identical values
tests.context: Add inside the existing 'US-008' describe block. Verifies acceptance criterion: mapping remains stable within session.

tests.description: higher DPR/cores and wider aspect ratio produce higher structureComplexity
tests.context: Add inside the existing 'US-008' describe block. Validates that the mapping is directionally correct: more capable devices with wider screens get higher complexity.

tests.description: scene still works with all null/missing signals — curveSoftness and structureComplexity have safe defaults
tests.context: Add inside the existing 'US-008' describe block. Verifies acceptance criterion: scene works if some signals are missing.

Add inside the existing 'US-012: Time-based evolution' describe block. Must update the baseParams fixture at the top of the file to include curveSoftness and structureComplexity. Verifies that device-derived structural params are not evolved (remain stable within session).
Add inside the existing 'US-012: Time-based evolution' describe block. Same pattern as T-011-09 but for structureComplexity.

tests.description: curveSoftness >= 0.5 causes circular particle rendering (ctx.arc called)
tests.context: Add inside a new 'US-011: Device profile to structure' describe block within the existing test file. Must update defaultParams fixture to include curveSoftness: 0.5, structureComplexity: 0.5.

tests.description: curveSoftness < 0.5 causes rectangular particle rendering (ctx.fillRect called, no ctx.arc)
tests.context: Add inside the 'US-011: Device profile to structure' describe block.

tests.description: structureComplexity affects effective particle count — lower complexity produces fewer particles
tests.context: Add inside the 'US-011: Device profile to structure' describe block. Validates that structureComplexity scales the effective particle count as described in the plan (low complexity = 60% of density-driven count, high = 100%).

tests.description: scene renders without errors at boundary values of curveSoftness and structureComplexity
tests.context: Add inside the 'US-011: Device profile to structure' describe block. Verifies robustness at edge values.

tests.description: structureComplexity modulates hue offset spread — higher complexity produces more color variety
tests.context: Add inside the 'US-011: Device profile to structure' describe block. Validates that structureComplexity affects hue offset spread as described in plan step 6.

tests.description: at least two structural parameters are driven by device signals
tests.context: Add inside the existing 'US-008' describe block. Directly validates acceptance criterion: at least two structural parameters are driven by signals.

fixtures_to_update.description: No VisualParams fixture is constructed directly in this file — tests use mapSignalsToVisuals output. No fixture update needed here.
Add curveSoftness: 0.5 and structureComplexity: 0.5 to the baseParams fixture on line 5-14. Update the keys array in T-012-01 to include 'curveSoftness' and 'structureComplexity'.
Add curveSoftness: 0.5 and structureComplexity: 0.5 to the defaultParams fixture on line 9-18.
